title: Final Integrative Evaluation: 9 Paper Tables, Hypothesis Scorecard v5, and Statistical Summary from 30 Artifacts
summary: Demo notebook for the Final Integrative Evaluation of the Join Reproduction Number (JRN) framework. Loads pre-computed evaluation results (33 examples across 11 dataset groups) and demonstrates: JRN matrix analysis with category classification, Fisher z random-effects meta-analysis for probe validity, cost efficiency analysis, FK-shuffling structural/feature decomposition with Cohen's d, hypothesis scorecard v5 grading 7 claims, and aggregate metrics summary. Produces a 3-panel visualization showing JRN distribution, structural vs feature decomposition, and scorecard grade distribution. Uses scipy stats, numpy, and matplotlib.
